title: [CR] Rust error.rs: re-exports from lichen-ipv6 but no doc explaining the relationship
description:
File: rust/lichen-core/src/error.rs

The file was refactored from defining TooShort/BufferTooSmall locally to re-exporting them from lichen-ipv6:
    pub use lichen_ipv6::{BufferTooSmall, TooShort};

This creates a dependency from lichen-core -> lichen-ipv6 just for error types. The module doc says 'Re-exports structured error types from lichen-ipv6' but doesn't explain why lichen-ipv6 is the canonical source.

Consider: The types are generic (not IPv6-specific), so having them in lichen-ipv6 vs lichen-core is an architectural choice that should be documented.

Low priority: This is just a documentation/architecture clarity issue.
close_reason: Documentation suggestion - re-export relationship is clear from import; additional doc deferred
